ideation: This sequence will animate the robot making a spinning motion with its arms, mimicking the eight spokes of an asterisk.  The arms will move in a circular pattern, alternating between outward and inward positions. The wrists will remain relatively neutral, focusing the visual effect on the arm's rotation.  Each frame will show a significant change in arm position to clearly define the keyframes for the animation system. To start, both arms will be outstretched in a horizontal position, with a slight upward angle.  Then they will move inward, and then back outward, completing a full 360 degree rotation. This creates a dynamic and expressive motion that reflects the asterisk's symmetry and radial design.

frames.beat: arms shoot out wide, forming a horizontal asterisk
arms sweep inward, crossing the body tightly
arms shoot out wide again, a different angle
arms sweep inward, completing the spin
